notes: This fixture snapshots D20 and D21 marker-generation anchors from the frozen source-side shell/AWK/C generator path.
Dynamic generator anchors are represented by their source printf format and expanded by Oracle tests into concrete D20/D21 manifest literals.
Oracle tests compare manifest literals to this checked-in fixture and do not read source-side scripts/launchd as live authority.
D20 ordering is owned by Phase08.LaunchctlVerifierCommon; D21 remains manifest-backed without a separate order list in this migration chunk.
